demo.title: on-chain-monitor.sh
demo.code:
# Run the configured watchlist
aeon-on-chain-monitor

# Watchlist entry:
#   address: 0xTreasury
#   alert_transfer_min_usd: 100000
#   alert_new_approval: true

setup: Configure RPC endpoint(s) per chain — Bankr / Quicknode / Alchemy recommended
Populate the watchlist YAML with addresses + filters
